headline: One call replaces a hundred emails.
lede: Access 600+ selected European group hotels through one dedicated contact, with direct contracts and fast turnaround.
problem_checklist: High hotel staff turnover means slower response times
s2_heading: We don't knock on doors. We already have the keys.
s2_checklist: Access to 600+ selected group hotels across Europe
Embedded in every hotel, from front desk to ownership level
Ad-hoc response in 1–2 days, series within 7 working days

steps.title: Tell us the brief
steps.body: Type, star rating, destination, location preference.

steps.title: Set the target
steps.body: Target rate, dinner yes/no, special requirements, option required.

steps.title: Share the context
steps.body: Already sold or still being quoted, expected conversion for series.

steps.title: Done
steps.body: The right hotel, the best offer, direct contract.

s3_heading: What you get, working with one contact
s3_checklist: Up to 50% less time spent on hotel contracting
One contact instead of dozens of follow-ups
testimonial_quote: "Stream2 gives us one contact for hotel contracting instead of dozens. It's cut our sourcing time significantly, and the contracts always come directly from the hotel."
testimonial_cite: Contracting Manager, Top 3 Spanish Tour Operator
